project_metadata.description: Single-page web app for browsing books and reading them in a modal. Book data loads from Books.js; content fetched from local .txt files.
project_metadata.core_purpose: Simple book browser and reader on one page
project_metadata.target_audience: Casual readers seeking free, instant-access online books; desktop/mobile web

pages.purpose: Landing and book browsing/reading. All UX on single page.
pages.description: Single-page app landing page. 2-row flex vertical: sticky header then content. Content grid with responsive cards—each for a book (thumbnail, title, author, Read button). Reading modal overlays page on Read click. Modal uses blur effect, dark glass impact. Footer sticks to bottom. Animations for opening/closing modal and button hover. Paddings: Header 24px, Content 32px, Footer 16px. Max width 1200px center-aligned. Minimal, modern book library aesthetic.
pages.content_notes: Only landing page. Library grid, book cards, and modal reader on one view. All book data loaded from local Books.js. Book content is loaded and displayed within modal by fetching corresponding Books/[id].txt file. Responsive, page has glassmorphic panels and indigo effects. Clean, high-contrast reader UX, disables background scroll during reading. No other pages.

components.description: Sticky top header; flex row layout, 24px horizontal/8px vertical padding, z-30. Contains left-aligned bold site title (xl, Inter), right-aligned navigation text (hidden). Weathered white text, shadowed, simple logo placeholder (36px) left. No drop-shadow, only sticky effect.

Responsive flex column, rounded-2xl, shadow-sm, overflow-hidden card. 12px padding at all sides, glassmorphic background (blur-20px), 16px margin-bottom. Sub-elements: thumbnail (rounded-lg, 128px), title (bold, md), author (medium), pill-shaped Read button with gradient background & Framer animation glow (on hover). Cards arrange in responsive grid (min-w:200px, max-w:300px, gap-6).

Full-screen overlay modal (z-50), glassmorphic container (radius-20px, intense blur, dark indigo overlay). Centered within Viewport (max-w-2xl), flex-col, 32px padding x/y, 24px gap. Sub-elements: Book title (bold, 2xl), author (medium), main book content (mono, scrollable, high-contrast), close (top-right pill button, indigo background). Animated open/close (500ms fade & slide-in), disables background scroll when active.
components.purpose: Display full book content for reading

components.description: Bottom sticky footer; flex-row center-aligned, 24px top margin, 16px vertical padding. Small, semi-transparent text (sm, Inter), glassmorphic panel with soft gradient. Includes copyright and project credit.

frontend.state_management: useState/useEffect for modal and book load state
